text.title: Video Gen Service — Failure Modes
text.summary: Five antipatterns in production video-gen service.

failure-mode.description: In-memory queue — pod restart loses queued jobs; tenants re-submit; double billing.
failure-mode.detector: queue.kind == in-memory OR no Redis/SQS persistence
failure-mode.repair: Use Redis Streams or SQS. Configure dead-letter queue for permanent failures.

failure-mode.description: No per-tenant quota — one tenant exhausts provider quota; all tenants 429.
failure-mode.detector: tenant_quotas missing OR default value 0 or null
failure-mode.repair: Enforce default quota; require explicit override for VIP tenants.

failure-mode.description: ffmpeg invoked from request handler — blocks request thread; service unresponsive.
failure-mode.repair: Move ffmpeg to worker; never inline in HTTP handler. Workers can be horizontally scaled.

failure-mode.description: Cost cap checked AFTER submit — provider already billed; cap is decorative.
failure-mode.detector: cost cap check appears after submit() in code flow
failure-mode.repair: Move check before queue.put(). Reject 402 if projected breach.

failure-mode.description: No idempotency — caller network blip causes double-submit; double-billed.
failure-mode.repair: Honour Idempotency-Key with 24h window. Same key returns existing job_id without billing.
